prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 3.0L LF4 twin-turbo V6 (404 hp) with a bespoke Hennessey HPE1200 upgrade package, including forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo H-beam rods), ported cylinder heads with upgraded valves and springs, and a custom billet crankshaft. Pair with a pair of Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (1.15 A/R, 76mm compressor wheels) and a Motec M150 ECU for precise boost control (targeting 22 psi on 93 octane).

Exhaust: Install a full custom 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Armytrix with electronically controlled valves, bypassing the stock catalytic converters and integrating a secondary X-pipe for optimized scavenging. Use Inconel 625 headers with equal-length runners to maximize turbo spool and top-end power (estimated 1,050 whp on E85).

Suspension/Handling: Replace the stock Magnetic Ride Control 3.0 with a full Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilover kit (CT6-specific valving, 24-way compression/rebound adjustability) paired with Eibach ERS 1,200 lb/in springs. Add a full chassis reinforcement kit by CPP (subframe connectors, strut tower braces, and a bolt-in roll cage with integrated harness bars) to eliminate flex under extreme lateral loads. Use Brembo GT-R 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers with 410mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS3.1 pads for fade-resistant braking.
estetica: Aero: Install a full Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (CT6-specific, carbon fiber construction) with extended front fenders, aggressive side skirts, and a ducktail rear spoiler. Add a custom front splitter with integrated canards and a rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny, both in dry carbon fiber for weight savings. Use a custom active aero system with hydraulic actuators (controlled via the Motec ECU) to adjust downforce dynamically at speed.

Wheels/Tires: Fit a set of custom HRE P107SC wheels (21x10.5 front, 21x12.5 rear) with a concave design, shod in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 front, 325/25 rear). Use a custom 5x120 to 5x114.3 adapter hub system by KARBON to accommodate the wider rear track while maintaining OEM bolt patterns for reliability.

Interior/Exterior Finishes: Replace the stock leather with a full Alcantara-wrapped interior by Katzkin, including Recaro SPG XL seats (CT6-specific mounts) with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Add a custom digital dash by AIM MXS Strada (integrated with the Motec ECU) and a full carbon fiber trim package by VIS Racing (door cards, center console, dashboard). Exterior: Apply a custom matte PPF by XPEL Stealth with a satin finish, paired with a full vinyl wrap in 3M Gloss Black Cherry with gold pinstriping by Avery Dennison.
